prompt: Estimate or interpret the measurable condition and state why it is out of tolerance.
scenario: In a T3 work setting, the evaluated element is H-201 Duct installation within 2.3 HVAC-R. The relevant subcategory is 2.3.2 Distribution. title: T3 H-201 Measurement & estimation
